vocab.meaning: biểu tượng của sự khác biệt và đẳng cấp
vocab.example: In high-stakes business environments, a vintage timepiece often serves as a badge of distinction that commands respect.

vocab.meaning: sự phức tạp về mặt cơ khí
vocab.instruction: IELTS Expert Note: Use this to discuss the technical appreciation of watchmaking.
vocab.example: Purists are often willing to pay a premium for the mechanical complexity found in hand-assembled movements.

vocab.meaning: tài sản hữu hình (có giá trị thực tế)
vocab.example: Unlike digital gadgets, luxury watches are considered a tangible asset that can be liquidated or pawned if necessary.
Wearing a high-end, understated watch can help a young consultant exude an air of professionalism during client meetings.

vocab.meaning: di sản của tổ tiên (giá trị thừa kế)
vocab.example: For some, the cost is irrelevant compared to the ancestral legacy represented by a family watch passed down through generations.
